---
title: '2014-01-05 Church Notes'
date: '2014-01-05T15:01:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7220967172022198542'
blogger_filename: '/2014/01/2014-01-05-church-notes.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Church Notes'
---

James Robison Retaking USA<br />
The battle of the great I-Will is battling the GreatIAm.<br />
WWW.jamesrobison.net<br />
Freedom<br />
1 Kings 18: Challenge of Fire<br />
850:1<br />
Deut 4 Fire<br />
Birds don't worry but they do get up early to work.<br />
Who is Denis leyman, former gay?<br />
Love people, keep the standard but really embrace and love them?<br />
We're too busy being in church instead of being the Church.<br />
NOTE: What if you viewed YOUR ministry as that which you do outside the "church" walls.<br />
<div>
<br /></div>
